name: ANSYS Fluent
description: An industry-standard CFD platform used for complex aerodynamic, thermal, and flow-system analysis across aerospace programmes.
whyUseIt: ANSYS Fluent combines mature solvers, strong pre and post-processing support, and organisational trust. In aerospace teams, it often becomes the bridge between exploratory CFD and high-stakes design reviews.
fieldPosition: Higher-fidelity aerodynamic and thermal analysis in preliminary and detailed design
engineerWorkflow: Set up the domain, mesh, boundary conditions, and turbulence model, then run convergence and validation studies before comparing design options.
managerExpects: Well-scoped simulation campaigns tied to real decisions, not expensive modelling without validation or review discipline.
demoDescription: Compare pressure recovery and drag behaviour for two airfoil shapes near the top of the operating lift range.
beginnerMistakes: Running complex cases before validating a simpler baseline
Treating colourful flow plots as evidence without checking residuals or mesh quality
